---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Akashi
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.
Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Domain

Which part of Akashi would this affect?

- [ ] Sources (rule indexing, tree view)
- [ ] Graph (D3 visualization)
- [ ] Addons (marketplace, installation)
- [ ] Pulse (session analytics, dashboard)
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Config / Settings
- [ ] New domain / cross-cutting

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
